overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long SPOT Daily ETF (SPOG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund is actively managed, aiming to provide daily 2x leveraged exposure to the price performance of Spotify Technology S.A. (NYSE: SPOT) stock, less fees, and expenses SPOG was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
